note: Buckets/methods/rationale come from `node scripts/testing-v2/gen-inventory.mjs` (curated overrides live in the generator). The `migrated`/`v2Path` per-entry fields and the top-level `v2Native` allowlist are reconciled against the tests2/ tree and are validated by scripts/testing-v2/parity.mjs and tests2/core/guard-v2.test.ts â€” do not hand-edit them blindly.

v2Native.reason: Pinning tests for buildResolvedModelStateModel (ws/handler.ts): custom/unknown provider (resolver source=inferred) preserves live contextWindow/maxTokens/reasoning/thinkingLevelMap, while known Fable model still gets authoritative catalog metadata incl. thinkingLevelMap.max over stale live base.

Reproducing + decision-matrix tests for the destructive pre-verification goal-worktree sync: local-ahead un-pushed commit B must survive (not be discarded by `git reset --hard origin/<goalBranch>`), local-behind fast-forwards to origin, diverged keeps local + warns, up-to-date is a no-op. Drives the real VerificationHarness against real temp git repos.
Native v2 core unit tests for extracted base_ref REST validation grammar and exact error-shape helpers.

Native v2 unit tests for the deletion-tombstones module (record/read round-trips, idempotency, per-file namespacing, dir creation, missing/corrupt-file tolerance) that guards staff/session/goal resurrection on boot repair.

Failing-first reproducing DOM test for Pause Feedback: no-descendant dashboard Pause, dashboard Resume, and transcript paused-banner Resume controls must immediately disable, show Pausing…/Resuming…, and suppress duplicate POSTs while the gateway request is pending.

Pinning DOM coverage for Create Goal proposal feedback: assistant preview and regular proposal panels must immediately show Creating…, disable/mark busy, suppress duplicate POST /api/goals calls while pending, and clear pending state after a failed create.
Failing-first reproducing tests for Permission Card UX reducer lifecycle: denied rows must remain as compact history, timed-out rows settle stale/expired, and superseded rows stop being actionable.

Failing-first reproducing DOM tests for Permission Card UX: blocked no-result tool calls must not render complete, streaming tool-call context must persist through tool_permission_needed, grant errors clear spinners, pinned+inline permission cards share state, pinned grant/deny settles rows, and pinned controls derive from current transcript rows.

Failing-first browser fixture for Permission Card UX: bottom-pinned active permission controls stay visible with a scrolled transcript, do not overlap editor/status/safe-area, grant/deny from pinned controls settle correctly, and reconnect/alive-socket remount derives pinned controls from current rows.

Reproducing test for the 'Fix cross-session proposal panels' goal: from a NON-matching session (assistantType === null) a role/tool/staff proposal that reaches the panel through the UNIFIED remote.onProposal path alone (source 'seed'/'rehydrate'/'edit'/'restore'/switch-back — not the live tool-use scan that also fires the legacy per-type callback) leaves the legacy form-mirror (rolePreviewName…, toolPreviewName…, staffPreviewName…) empty, so the panel renders blank and its primary submit stays disabled/absent. Drives onProposal directly (same technique as tests2/browser/e2e/proposal-inline-comments.spec.ts) and asserts the mirror is populated + submit enabled. FAILS on HEAD (no role/tool/staff bridge in the unified callback, only goal is bridged), passes once the bridge is added.

Failing-first browser journey for Project Proposal Accept no-op: registered Apply shows pending/disabled duplicate-click guard, registered rename failures surface a connection error without clearing the proposal, provisional config failures surface an error without cleanup, and registered success closes the proposal. Deterministic repro opts out of the retry bridge with retries:0. FAILS on HEAD until project proposal accept pending/error handling is fixed.

Browser regression coverage for Refresh Staff UI: while the app is open, staff create/delete calls made through API/tool-equivalent endpoints must update desktop and mobile sidebars without reload, show the staff row under Staff, and keep the permanent staff-agent session out of regular Sessions.

Reproducing test (TDD red) for the 'Fix git widget flash' goal (32cd6b4f): pins the NEW pure module src/app/git-repo-cache.ts — sessionId->'yes'|'no' localStorage cache and computeConnectGitState (cached 'no' => {gitRepoKnown:'no',quietRecheck:true} so no skeleton/loading on reconnect; cached 'yes'/no-entry => {gitRepoKnown:'unknown',quietRecheck:false} so a genuine first check still shows the skeleton), plus prune/cap bounds and broken/absent-localStorage tolerance. FAILS on HEAD (module absent — import cannot resolve), passes post-fix.

Integration coverage for the 'Fix git widget flash' goal (32cd6b4f): pins the session-manager quiet-recheck state machine extracted into runWidgetGitRefresh (src/app/git-status-refresh.ts). Asserts (1) a cached-'no' quiet reconnect NEVER writes gitStatusLoading=true, fires exactly one recheck, keeps gitRepoKnown='no' and caches 'no'; (2) when the quiet recheck's onOk fires the repo now exists so gitRepoKnown flips to 'yes', the widget reveals, cache writes 'yes', and loading is cleared in finally; (3) a genuine first-ever check (quiet=false / gitRepoKnown='unknown') DOES set gitStatusLoading=true (skeleton allowed) with one fetch.

Reproducing test (TDD red) for the 'Cache empty git-widget state' goal (44e3b434): pins the HQ 409 / GOAL_GIT_UNAVAILABLE path where git-status maps to error, retries exhaust with no branch/status data, and the widget renders nothing. Expects a persisted 'hidden' repo hint, cached-hidden reconnect to start quiet with no gitStatusLoading=true skeleton, exactly one quiet showable recheck, and reveal/cache 'yes' when content appears. FAILS on HEAD until the hidden/empty cache state is implemented.

Pinning test for the 'Direct-agent admin token' interim rollback: non-sandboxed (direct) agents receive the gateway ADMIN token (readToken()) via scopedGatewayEnvForDirectAgent (createSession/createDelegateSession) and applyScopedGatewayCredentials (restore/revive/respawn), while the sandbox path (mintScopedGatewayToken) still produces a per-project SCOPED token distinct from the admin token. Also pins the loud-throw when no admin token is available (no silent fallback).

Reproducing test for the 'Fix LLM review reliability' goal: pins per-attempt fresh reviewer session id (transcript not clobbered on retry) and honoring of a verification_result that arrives during teardown (no 404-drop). FAILS on HEAD, passes post-fix. Companion assertions pin the completed-but-missed-tool-call classification (non-transient → no from-scratch re-run) and that within-budget transient failures still retry.

Companion invariant for the 'Fix LLM review reliability' goal: SessionManager.createSession refuses to clobber an already-LIVE session id (loud throw), while opts.allowSessionReuse bypasses the guard for the sanctioned restart-resume path.
Playwright renderer tests for nine Children tools — uses real Chromium DOM; parallel to tests2/dom/ vitest rewrite. Tracked here to prevent orphan detection false positive.

Part 1+2 of 'Hide/Disable PR & Hindsight': fresh-state browser journey proving pr-walkthrough ships default-OFF (no contributions/tools, deep-link unavailable, master toggle rendered+unchecked), enabling via the marketplace master toggle lights up all contributions and persists across reload, disabling turns it off again; plus hindsight is absent from the built-in group and from /api/marketplace/installed. Complements the enabled-baseline live-feature spec at tests2/browser/e2e/pr-walkthrough-pack.spec.ts.
Native v2 core tests for PR walkthrough local diff resolver error/truncation/empty-diff behavior moved out of the route-level integration suite.
bobbit gateway tool suite: credential/URL resolution — env creds, state-file fallback, absent-creds (logs + no registration, no throw), baseUrl trailing-slash trimming.
bobbit gateway tool suite: per-operation dispatch — path/query building (ids, probe/action selectors, cascade), body building, and HTTP method correctness per tier.
bobbit gateway tool suite: runtime validation — unknown operation and missing required params (incl. mandatory projectId) return an error result with no fetch issued.
bobbit gateway tool suite: error surfacing — non-2xx { error, code } render with machine code + HTTP status; 204/empty bodies normalize to a success shape.
bobbit gateway tool suite: tier separation — YAML group/grantPolicy defaults and operation-union drift guard vs the dispatched catalogue and design §5.
bobbit gateway tool suite: pagination contract — bounded list-style bobbit_read responses, fallback/post-response slicing, preserved ancillary fields, and normalized pagination metadata.

Reproducing tests for the Hide Archived Lists goal: bobbit_read list_sessions/list_goals/search must hide archived primary rows and archive-only enrichment by default while preserving explicit archive opt-ins; pins SearchService default includeArchived=false.
bobbit gateway tier role-policy invariant: bobbit_orchestrate/bobbit_admin default never; ONLY general + support + team-lead re-grant orchestrate, ONLY general + support get admin behind ask.

Support assistant backend wiring: getAssistantDef('support') registered; defaults/roles/support.yaml loads with accessory headset + support policies (orchestrate allow, admin ask, session_prompt allow); SUPPORT_ASSISTANT_PROMPT carries the confirmation-first instruction; assistantRoleForType maps support->support else assistant.

Support assistant offline packaging: package.json files ships docs/ + src/; npm pack --dry-run --json lists docs/ + src/ entries; resolveBundledDocsDir/resolveBundledSrcDir return existing directories.

Reproducing integration test for the Support Assistant fix-up (defects 5 & 6): a running Support session (assistantType=support, projectId=headquarters) must persist role=support + accessory=headset (not the hardcoded assistant/wand), and its prompt-sections must expose a dedicated Role section (source 'Role: support') carrying the support role promptTemplate WITHOUT folding it into the Goal section (no duplication).
DI contract: cli.ts passes no test doubles (default-real wiring).
DI seam contract: fenced CommandRunner rejects non-local remotes/gh/docker.
DI seam contract: fenced fetch rejects non-loopback hosts.
DI contract: constructing without deps uses real timers/exec/fetch/fs.
DI seam contract: fake verification command-step runner is observably equivalent to the real durable runner; seam defaults to real; cli wires no fake.
DI contract: store fsImpl defaults to node:fs; memfs override works.

Protocol-compatibility pin: tests/e2e/ledger-lease-bridge.mjs (Playwright-safe lease client) and scripts/testing-v2/ledger.mjs share the same on-disk lease protocol so the global concurrency caps hold across the browser + vitest tiers; also pins the standalone vitest cap below parent-ledger grants.

Pins the unit-lanes ORCHESTRATOR scheduling contract so `npm run test:unit` (run-unit-lanes.mjs) completes within the gate wall-time budget: ledger.reserveVitestLaneBudget() grants the fair core budget (not the single-process STANDALONE_VITEST_CAP throttle, which is left unchanged at 2), and planLaneConcurrency() distributes it so lanes overlap (maxConcurrent=floor(grant/perLane)) without ever raising a single vitest process above the Windows-RPC-safe per-process fork cap. Guards against the serial-lane gate timeout regression.
Harness contract: per-test scope() cleanup / entity leak detector.

Temp-FS only, external-free core tier. FAILS on HEAD (helpers absent, ensureNodeModulesJunction still defined), passes post-fix.

Pi 0.80.5 RPC compatibility: retryable agent_end events carry willRetry=true before Pi internal auto-retry settles. Bobbit must not mark the session idle, drain queued prompts, revoke one-time grants, or resolve waitForIdle until the final non-retry agent_end.
